Appearances:
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Philip Tam. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Shatara Williams is present.
Attorney Matina McDaniel representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants confer privately

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of DEC-19-2011 is vacated.
